info.title: Kalos Fitness API
info.description:
API for the Kalos fitness application - a progressive calisthenics training tracker.

## Authentication
All endpoints require Bearer token authentication via better-auth.

## Core Concepts
- **Exercise Categories**: Groups of exercises (push-ups, pull-ups, squats, etc.)
- **Exercises**: Individual exercises with progression levels within categories
- **Programs**: User training plans with scheduled training days
- **Workout Sessions**: Actual workout instances organized into rounds
- **User Category Levels**: Track user's current progression level per category

domain.description: The domain name for the API

delete.description: Soft-deletes the program by setting archivedAt

post.description: Create a new planned or immediate workout session

post.description: Transition session from planned to in_progress

patch.description: Record actual value, mark as completed

MeasurementType.description: Type of measurement for exercise (reps, time in seconds, or distance in meters)

isVariant.description: Whether this is a variant of another exercise

progressionThreshold.description: Target value to unlock next progression

perSide.description: Whether the target value is per side

restAfterSec.description: Rest after this round in seconds

perSide.description: Whether the value is per side

restAfterSec.description: Rest after this exercise in seconds
